plot outline: In this adventure/drama, CIA agent Matt Graver (Josh Brolin) enlists a mysterious operative to help investigate a Mexican drug cartel that has been smuggling terrorists into the U.S. Things escalate when the daughter of a top kingpin is abducted, forcing Graver and his partner to re-evaluate their mission.
title: Sicario: Day of the Soldado
akas: Sicario 2: Day of the Soldado (Hong Kong, English title)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
